SELECT getMacro((SELECT macro FROM macros_test WHERE macro LIKE 'ex%'));
SELECT getMacro((SELECT macro FROM (SELECT macro FROM macros_test) AS inner_table WHERE macro = 'another_macro'));
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT getMacro(macro) FROM macros_test);
CREATE TABLE temp_macros (macro_name String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_macros SELECT macro FROM macros_test;
SELECT getMacro((SELECT macro_name FROM temp_macros WHERE macro_name = 'test'));
SELECT getMacro('nonexistent_macro') UNION ALL SELECT 'Default Value';
SELECT getMacro((SELECT macro FROM macros_test ORDER BY macro LIMIT 1));
